prompt: Elegant square baby girl naming ceremony invitation. Soft blush pink and gold palette. Large delicate watercolor flower wreath border made of roses, peonies, eucalyptus leaves, and baby's breath surrounding the text. No baby illustration. Clean white linen background. Text centered inside the wreath: 'It'\''s a Girl!' in thin gold script at top, 'Elena' in large elegant gold calligraphy as the main name, below in refined serif font: 'Naming Ceremony · Saturday, March 14 · 10:30 AM', 'Chabad of Coronado · 1033 B Ave #300, Coronado CA', 'Brunch to follow at 12:00 PM', 'Eduardo & Sara' at the bottom in italic. Luxury stationery aesthetic, romantic floral style.
